Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Gloster in Propria Persona

The Court made inquiries regarding Mr. Gloster knowledge of Probate procedures, whether he can manage without an attorney, whether he knows to notify the tax authority (Franchise Tax Board), how to complete an inventory and appraisal, not to co-mingle funds, and not to distribute funds without court approval. Mr. Gloster stated that his father only has 2 bank accounts (one account valued at $235,000.00 and the other valued at $52,000.00), he needs to pay back $3,000.00 to the pension from the City and County of San Francisco, he has a receipt from 1800Got JUNK, his father had no other personal properties, and he has an attorney friend who he can ask for help. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order), bond is waived. Status on filing of inventory and appraisal is set for November 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
